def test_04_index_hot_sales(self):
        """IX-03: 热销推荐"""
        page = IndexPage(self.mini)
        page.refresh_page()
        time.sleep(2)
        count = page.get_hot_sales_count()
        print(f'  热销推荐商品数: {count}')
        self.assertGreater(count, 0, '热销推荐无商品')
